title: DistributedPhysiology
description: Ant colonies regulate collective behavior through interactions among individual workers, creating colony-level physiological processes that are distributed across all individuals. We examine how this...
abstract: Ant colonies regulate collective behavior through interactions among individual workers, creating colony-level physiological processes that are distributed across all individuals. We examine how this distributed physiology emerges from local interactions, neurochemistry, and gene expression patterns. The colony operates as a superorganism in which physiological regulation—metabolism, water balance, immunity—is accomplished collectively through decentralized interaction networks rather than centr
